project: Aurentia Agency — Design Polish All Pages
description: Pixel-perfect design polish for all 13 pages. Add visual depth (orbs, hero-grid, gradient mesh), premium micro-interactions, massive typography, glassmorphism, page transitions. Reference: Linear.app / homepage Aurentia level.

userStories.title: Shared visual components + page transitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reusable visual building blocks and page transitions so that every page has consistent premium quality
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/ui/SectionBackground.tsx — accepts props: orbs (array of {color, position, size, opacity}), showGrid (boolean for hero-grid pattern), showGradientMesh (boolean), variant ('base'|'alt') for alternating bg
Create src/components/ui/SectionDivider.tsx — gradient line or fade transition between sections
Create src/components/ui/GradientPlaceholder.tsx — beautiful gradient card for missing images, accepts aspectRatio and label props, animated subtle gradient shift
Add page transition in src/app/template.tsx — fade + translateY(10px) entry animation on route change using Framer Motion AnimatePresence
SectionBackground supports hero-grid with variable opacity per page (prop: gridOpacity)
All components work in dark AND light mode with semantic tokens
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: components render correctly, page transition works between pages
userStories.notes: Read the existing hero-grid CSS class in globals.css. Read HomeTeam.tsx for orbs pattern reference. Read the PRD at tasks/prd-design-polish-all-pages.md for full context. The page transition should be subtle (300-400ms fade, not jarring).

userStories.title: /a-propos — Hero, Story, Values polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the about page top sections to feel immersive and layered like the homepage
acceptanceCriteria: AboutHero: add SectionBackground with hero-grid + 3 orbs (orange/8, violet/5, cyan/4), grid fades to bottom
AboutHero: title upgraded to text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl xl:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-[0.95]
AboutHero: accent gradient (orange→ambre) on key words in H1 ('instrument de précision')
AboutStory: add subtle left border-l-2 accent-primary on each paragraph block
AboutStory: increase spacing to py-28 md:py-36
AboutStory: add SectionDivider between hero and story
AboutValues: add SectionBackground with orbs behind the bento grid
AboutValues: icons use accent-primary color with subtle bg glow (bg-accent-primary/10)
AboutValues: card 1 (span-2) has gradient border shimmer effect
AboutValues: increase spacing to py-28 md:py-36
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: sections feel layered and immersive, dark+light mode OK
userStories.notes: Read src/components/about/AboutHero.tsx, AboutStory.tsx, AboutValues.tsx. Read HomeTeam.tsx for orbs reference. Do NOT change text content.

userStories.title: /a-propos — Team, FatherSon, Hackathons, Proof polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the about page middle sections to feel rich with premium cards and interactions
acceptanceCriteria: AboutTeam: add SectionBackground with hero-grid + orbs, same as HomeTeam pattern
AboutTeam: add tilt 3D on hover for team cards (max 3-5deg rotation, GSAP)
AboutFatherSon: highlight quote in glassmorphism card with gradient border, text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl
AboutFatherSon: increase section spacing to py-28 md:py-36
AboutHackathons: cards with glassmorphism + subtle ambre glow border on hover
AboutProof: counters in text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black with subtle glow underline
AboutProof: marquee items larger (text-lg), add dot separators between tech names
All sections alternate between base and alt backgrounds
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: visual richness builds progressively through the page
userStories.notes: Read AboutTeam.tsx, AboutFatherSon.tsx, AboutHackathons.tsx, AboutProof.tsx. Read HomeTeam.tsx for tilt reference.

userStories.title: /a-propos — Approach, Audience, CTA polish + final assembly
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the about page final sections to build to a powerful visual crescendo
acceptanceCriteria: AboutApproach: 3 pillars with distinct accent colors (orange, ambre, cyan) visible on icon bg + subtle glow behind each card
AboutAudience: check icons with accent-primary color, scale bounce more pronounced, items with subtle bg on hover
AboutCTA: gradient mesh MORE intense (orb opacities doubled), title text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl
AboutCTA: proof points with larger check icons, more spacing between items
Page assembly: verify all sections flow together with proper SectionDividers or SectionBackground alternation
Spacing consistent: py-28 md:py-36 on all content sections
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: scroll from top to bottom feels like a cinematic experience, crescendo visible

userStories.title: /realisations — Portfolio page polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the portfolio page to feel like a premium gallery
acceptanceCriteria: RealisationsHero: add SectionBackground with hero-grid + orbs (ambre/8, orange/5, rose/4)
RealisationsHero: title text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter
RealisationsCounters: numbers text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black with subtle accent glow underneath
RealisationsGrid: filter pills bigger (px-5 py-2.5 text-base font-medium), more spacing
RealisationsGrid: project cards image aspect-[16/9] rounded-2xl, gradient overlay at bottom on hover for text readability
RealisationsGrid: use GradientPlaceholder for projects without images
RealisationsInterlude: quote text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl italic, decorative quote marks in accent text-6xl md:text-8xl
RealisationsInterlude: add orbs/glow behind the quote
RealisationsCTA: gradient mesh intense, same pattern as AboutCTA but with ambre tones
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: page feels like browsing a high-end portfolio
userStories.notes: Read all files in src/components/realisations/. Use GradientPlaceholder from US-D01.

userStories.title: /realisations/[slug] — Case study polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want each case study to feel like a premium portfolio piece
acceptanceCriteria: ProjectHero: BrowserMockup with shadow-2xl + subtle accent glow ring around it
ProjectHero: metadata pills in glassmorphism style (bg-foreground/5 backdrop-blur border)
ProjectContext: wrap the 2 blocks in glassmorphism cards instead of bare text
ProjectSolution: feature icons with bg-accent-primary/10 + subtle glow, not just foreground color
ProjectGallery: images with shadow-xl rounded-2xl, subtle border-foreground/5, use GradientPlaceholder for missing images
ProjectResults: metric cards text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black with accent glow
ProjectTestimonial: decorative quote marks text-7xl md:text-8xl accent, glassmorphism card bg
ProjectNavigation: cards bigger with cover image visible, hover scale(1.03) + glow
ProjectCTA: gradient mesh bg with orbs
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: a case study page feels premium and complete

userStories.title: /conciergeries — Sales page polish (most important page)
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the main sales page to be the most visually impressive page on the site
acceptanceCriteria: ConciergerieHero: SectionBackground with hero-grid + animated orbs (orange/10, ambre/6, rose/4), title text-5xl to text-7xl
ConciergerieHero: stat cards in glassmorphism with glow
ConciergerieProblem: pain cards with subtle red/danger glow border, icons w-10 h-10 in colored bg circle
ConciergerieSolution: mockup with tilt 3D on hover, feature checks with bounce animation
ConciergerieInnovation: cards with large step numbers (01,02,03) in accent + glow
ConciergerieProcess: timeline nodes with scale bounce on scroll enter, line draw animation
ConciergeriePricing: Croissance card with glassmorphism + pulsing border accent, bigger price text
ConciergerieComparison: Aurentia column with bg-accent-primary/5, row hover highlight transition 500ms
ConciergerieFAQ: smooth height transition, chevron rotation, generous spacing between items
ConciergerieCTA: gradient mesh MAXIMUM intensity, multiple orbs, text-5xl to text-6xl
Visual narrative: page goes from dark (problem) → colorful (solution) → luminous (CTA) — verify scroll progression
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: this is THE most impressive page on the site
userStories.notes: Read all files in src/components/conciergerie/. This is the #1 priority page for design quality.

userStories.title: /sites-vitrines — Service page polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the sites vitrines page to feel premium yet accessible
acceptanceCriteria: Hero: SectionBackground with hero-grid + orbs, accent gradient on 'sur-mesure' and '48h' in title
Features: cards with varied sizes (card 1 span-2 with internal micro-animation), icons with accent color bg
Process: timeline with line draw animation on scroll, nodes with scale bounce
Niches: conciergeries card with gradient border shimmer, others with hover glow
Pricing: '900€' in gradient text-5xl md:text-6xl, glassmorphism card, glow pulse
Différenciateurs: colored icons (not monochrome) with subtle glow behind
Portfolio: GradientPlaceholder cards for missing images with project name overlay
FAQ: generous spacing, visual dividers between items
Sections alternate base/alt backgrounds
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser

userStories.title: /identite-visuelle — Craft-oriented page polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the visual identity page to feel artisanal and warm
acceptanceCriteria: Hero: warm tones (ambre dominant), subtle floating geometric shapes (CSS), hero-grid with warm orbs
Prestations: 4 cards with larger icons (w-12 h-12), layout 2x2 with generous gap-8, glassmorphism hover
Process: organic feel (rounded shapes, warm colors) different from tech pages
Portfolio: masonry-style or pinterest layout rather than uniform grid, GradientPlaceholder for missing images
Pourquoi: Fabien section with photo tilt 3D, quote in glassmorphism card with ambre border
Tarifs: 'sur devis' card with premium glassmorphism, price factors with icons and accent color
Color palette: warmer overall (ambre/10, or/6, rose/4) vs the tech orange/violet of other pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: page feels distinctly 'craft' and 'artisanal' compared to tech pages

userStories.title: /saas + /landing-pages — Tech pages polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the SaaS and Landing pages to feel high-tech and high-ticket
acceptanceCriteria: SaaS Hero: intense gradient mesh (violet + orange orbs), title text-5xl to text-7xl
SaaS Services bento: cards with subtle code/dashboard micro-animation inside (even just a blinking cursor in a code block)
SaaS Stack: tech items with hover glow, grid more airy (gap-6)
SaaS Pricing: '5 000€' in massive gradient text (text-5xl md:text-6xl), glassmorphism premium card
SaaS: page feels 'high-ticket' — more padding, bigger typography, more breathing room throughout
LandingPages Hero: add floating mini BrowserMockup as decorative element
LandingPages Features: gradient border cards, colored icons
LandingPages Vitrine: BrowserMockup larger, callouts with connecting lines (annotation style)
LandingPages: the page itself IS a demo of what we can build — it must be spectacular
Both pages: SectionBackground on hero + CTA, alternating section bgs
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: both pages feel high-end and worth the price
userStories.notes: Read all files in src/components/saas/ and src/components/landing-pages/.

userStories.title: /formation + /apport-affaires — Conversion pages polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the formation page to create FOMO and the referral page to make earning feel exciting
acceptanceCriteria: Formation Hero: 'COMING SOON' badge with continuous glow pulse + subtle particle-like dots floating
Formation Hero: gradient mesh with violet touch (formation = knowledge, different from business pages)
Formation Modules: bento cards with terminal/code style icons (blinking cursor effect via CSS animation)
Formation Waitlist CTA: email input with gradient border animation, success state with confetti-like glow burst
Apport Hero: '10%' in text-8xl md:text-9xl gradient text with animated shimmer
Apport Steps: connecting line animated (stroke-dashoffset on scroll), numbered circles in glassmorphism
Apport Gains: commission amounts in large gradient text that glows on hover
Apport CTA: primary button VERY prominent (bigger than secondary), WhatsApp button with green accent
Both pages: SectionBackground on hero + CTA, proper spacing py-28 md:py-36
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Read all files in src/components/formation/ and src/components/apport-affaires/.

userStories.title: Pages légales — Clean polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the legal pages to be clean, readable, and not ugly
acceptanceCriteria: Add subtle SectionBackground at top of each legal page (1 orb, low opacity, hero-grid faded)
ToC sidebar: smooth scroll on click, active item with accent-primary underline + subtle bg highlight
Section headers: add subtle left border-l-2 accent-primary
In-text links: underline on hover with accent color, transition 500ms
Spacing between articles: increase to mb-16
Mobile ToC: chevron with rotation animation, smooth open/close 700ms
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: legal pages are clean and professional, not ugly
userStories.notes: Read src/components/legal/ and src/app/cgv/page.tsx, mentions-legales/page.tsx, politique-confidentialite/page.tsx.

userStories.title: Cross-page consistency + final verification
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all pages to share the same visual DNA and have zero bugs
acceptanceCriteria: ALL pages use SectionBackground for at least hero + CTA sections
ALL page heroes have hero-grid pattern (with variable opacity per page)
ALL page CTAs have gradient mesh with orbs + MagneticButton glow
Sections alternate between base/alt backgrounds on every page
Spacing is consistent: py-28 md:py-36 on content sections across all pages
Homepage is NOT broken — verify it still works exactly as before
Every page verified in dark mode — no broken colors, no invisible text
Every page verified in light mode — same check
Every page verified at 375px width — no overflow, no cut text, no broken layout
Navigate between all pages — transitions are smooth, no flash of unstyled content
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: navigate home → each page → back, experience is seamless and premium
userStories.notes: This is the final QA pass. Check EVERY page. Fix anything that doesn't meet the standard.
